text: Bapu ne batwara mein khet ka upjau hissa chote bhai ko de diya taaki wo shehar jaake settle ho sake, par bade hone ke naate main koi sawal nahi utha sakta. Fasal barbaad hone ke baad bhi main din-raat mitti mein ghis raha hoon kyunki poore parivaar ka pet palna mera farz hai. Main thak gaya hoon par rukne ka rasta hi nahi hai, mujhe bas endurance dikhani hai.

Bhai ko property mein bada share mil gaya taaki uski shadi ki 'izzat' bani rahe, aur mere sar par sahukar ka pura karza chhod diya gaya hai. Main itna exhaust ho gaya hoon ki sharir jawab de raha hai, par 'cannot afford to stop' wala bojh mujhe har subah khet bhej deta hai. Mujhe bina ruke mehnat karni hi hogi taaki chote bhai ka rasta saaf rahe aur khandaan ka naam na doobe.

Bhai ke career ke liye Bapu ne jaydad uske naam kar di, aur mujhse umeed ki jati hai ki main kisan identity bachaye rakhun aur bina shikayat sab handle karun. Karze ki kist aur ghar ke kharche itne hain ki rone ka waqt bhi nahi milta, bas khet mein hal chalana hi mera dharm hai. Main mentally toot chuka hoon par parivaar ki structural stability mere hi kandhon par tiki hai.

Property batwara mein mere saath na-insafi hui par 'log kya kahenge' ki chinta mein main chup-chap khet mein pis raha hoon. Main itni thaki hui halat mein hoon ki lagta hai abhi gir jaunga, par chote bhai ki coaching fees aur behen ki shadi ke liye mujhe rukna manzoor nahi. Meri kurbani hi is parivaar ko tootne se bachayegi, isliye mujhe ye duty bina kisi sawal ke nibhani hai.

Bade hone ki yahi keemat hai ki bhai ko property aur azadi mili, aur mujhe sirf moneylender ke chakkar aur kheti ka bojh. Main poori tarah thak chuka hoon par parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye mujhe din-raat ek karna hi padega taaki ghar chalta rahe. Mera kaam sirf endurance dikhana hai, chahe andar se main kitna bhi akela aur khaali mehsus karun.
